Bullet Point 2: FLAVOR: The subtle and supportive citrus and fruit notes are perfectly balanced by the bitterness of the quinine to create a uniquely clean and refreshing taste
Bullet Point 3: NATURALLY SOURCED: Our Fever-Tree Indian Tonic, made with naturally sourced quinine and botanicals, contains no artificial sweeteners, flavorings or preservatives
Bullet Point 4: PREMIUM MIXER: Perfect in a Gin and Tonic, Vodka and Tonic, or simply as a sophisticated soft drink on its own
Bullet Point 5: TEXTURE: High carbonation delivers the aromas and taste in a classic, refreshing style

Item Name: Food to Live Nutritional Yeast Flakes, 12 Ounces Fortified Large Flakes, Inactive, Unsweetened, Vegan Thickener, Bulk. Good Source of Protein & Vitamins. Perfect for Baking, Vegan Cheese and Sauces
Bullet Point 1: ✔️PREMIUM QUALITY, KOSHER, VEGAN & KETO: Nutritional Yeast Flakes by Food to Live are a Premium Quality, Kosher product that is suitable for Vegan and Keto diets. It is also Unsalted and Unsweetened.
Bullet Point 2: ✔️HIGHLY NUTRITIOUS, FORTIFIED WITH VITAMINS: Our Nutritional Yeast is an amazing source of complete proteins, dietary fiber, antioxidants, essential minerals including Iron, Potassium, Zinc, Selenium, Manganese, Molybdenum and is enriched (or fortified) with Vitamins B1, B2, and B3.
Bullet Point 3: ✔️LARGE FLAKES, CHEESY TASTE: Food to Live’s Nutritional Yeast is made from a special strain of Yeast that has been inactivated and comes in a form of fairly large thin flakes. They have a savory, cheesy flavor that will complement various dishes.
Bullet Point 4: ✔️VERSATILE USES: Nutritional Yeast is a super versatile ingredient that you can use as a thickener for soups, sauces, dips, and gravies, add it to smoothies, curries, stir, fries, and chili. However, note that it will NOT make your baked goods rise since it has been inactivated.
Bullet Point 5: ✔️CHEESE SUBSTITUTE FOR DAIRY-FREE RECIPES: Nutritional Yeast Flakes have cheese-like taste and texture in recipes and are perfect for Vegan Mac n Cheese, or can be used as seasoning for salads, pasta, avocado toasts, popcorn, and homemade potato chips.
Value: 12.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Premium quality specialty food additive positioned as a vegan and keto-friendly cheese substitute. Resealable plastic pouch packaging indicates a focus on freshness and convenience for bulk use. Fortification with vitamins and complete proteins elevates its value proposition above basic yeast products.
